category_sources: source_facts.description says "Console Jabber client"; official MCabber wiki describes a console-based Jabber client with XMPP-related features.
display_name_sources: Official wiki and homepage use "MCabber"; source_facts.name is mcabber.
docs_sources: Official MCabber wiki links Getting Started and the small User Guide; source_facts.homepage is the official main site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official MCabber wiki links development history/source at hg.lilotux.net, indicating the project uses Mercurial rather than Git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says console Jabber client; official wiki describes text Jabber client features including SSL/TLS/SASL, history, and command completion.
